label: PASS
rationale: The Locking row sets the target range to enabled but unlocked and sets LockOnReset to an empty set. The cited rule says an empty set leaves ReadLocked and WriteLocked unchanged on any reset, so after PowerCycle the range remains writable and the final Write returning SUCCESS is compliant.
